page_metadata.biotools__summary: HESML is an efficient, scalable and large Java software library of ontology-based semantic similarity measures and Information Content (IC) models based on WordNet, SNOMED-CT, MeSH or any other OBO-based ontology.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: HESML is an efficient, scalable and large Java software library of ontology-based semantic similarity measures and Information Content (IC) models based on WordNet, SNOMED-CT, MeSH or any other OBO-based ontology.
